role: Context preservation across sessions, prevent agent amnesia, decision logging

state_persistence.description: Persist full agent conversation state and resume across sessions

tools.LangGraph_Checkpointer: PostgreSQL-backed checkpointing for full agent state persistence and resumption
tools.SQLite_PostgreSQL: Structured context storage (decisions, architectural choices, unresolved questions)

semantic_memory.description: Semantic search over past decisions, conversations, and context

tools.Qdrant: Production-grade vector database (Rust-based, fast) for semantic search over past context
tools.ChromaDB: Alternative lightweight vector DB for development
tools.LangMem: Purpose-built LangChain memory management (short-term, long-term, episodic)

decision_logging.description: Record every architectural and design decision with rationale

tools.Git: Codebase and commit history as persistent context
tools.Markdown_ADR: Architecture Decision Records stored in repo

decision_logging.format: Decision ID, Context, Options Considered, Decision, Rationale, Consequences

context_compression.description: Summarize older context to fit within LLM context windows

tools.Claude_API: Progressive summarization of past sprints and decisions

session_handoff.description: Structured summary at session end, loaded at session start
protocol: At session end: capture current task state, pending decisions, blockers
At session start: load last handoff + relevant long-term memories
Semantic retrieval of relevant past decisions for current task

entity_tracking.description: Track key entities and their current state

activation: Start of every new agent session
